prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TTX-PINKCRAFTMAT-PARENT Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Pink Self Healing Cutting Mat Craft Supplies (Assorted Sizes) Description: Cut, craft and design with confidence and style using our Self Healing Cutting Craft Mat bundle from ToolTreaux, in vibrant pink colorway! This bundle includes two self healing cutting mats in a smaller 9 x 12 inch size, and a larger 12 x 18 inch size.

Designed for makers of all kinds, whether it be for scrapbooking, pattern making, quilting, paper crafting, card making, vinyl cutting and more, this durable mat features a unique self healing surface that reseals after every slice, keeping your workspace smooth and your blades sharper for longer.

Whether you're measuring in inches or millimeters, the clearly marked dual grid system ensures precision with every cut. Perfectly sized for portability and everyday projects, this mat offers ample space without overwhelming your desk, while adding a fun splash of color to any creative workspace.

FEATURES: Sizes: 9 x 12 inch and 12 x 18 inch (one of each size)

Color: Stylish pink finish adds a fun, modern touch to crafting zone

Self Healing Surface: Long lasting durability that withstands repeated cuts

Dual Measurements: Easy to read inch and millimeter grid lines for versatile use

Protective and Precise: Safeguards your work surface while improving cutting accuracy Search Terms: Self healing cutting mat; craft supplies; art supplies; scrapbooking supplies; card making supplies; drawing pad; desk pad; jewelry making; hobby mat; sewing supplies; arts and crafts; kids art table; gift wrapping supplies; cutting board Features: - SELF HEALING CUTTING MAT: Safeguarding your workspace and prolonging the sharpness of cutting tools, this self healing cutting mat ensures a smooth cutting surface for every project, making it a must have craft supplies essential - DUAL MEASUREMENTS: Cutting mats provides ample working area with screened inch and millimeter measurements, as well as 45 and 60 degree trimming guides, that make for accurate measuring, trimming, drawing and more - STYLISH PINK COLOR: Add a splash of color and style to your studio or crafting zone with this cute pink self healing cutting mat with easy to read white measurements on one side; back side of cutting mat is solid pink with no measurements - ACCURATE & CONSISTENT CUTS: Providing a reliable cutting base and excellent work surface protection for kids art projects, drawing, vinyl cutting, paper crafting, scrapbooking, card making and so much more - SPECIFICATIONS: 9x12 Mat Weight: 0.66lbs; 12x18 Mat Weight: 1.30lbs; Color: Pink; Cutting Mat Height: 0.125 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Pink Self Healing Cutting Mat Bundle 2-Pack

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux Assorted Sizes Pink Self Healing Cutting Mat

anthropic.title_differentiation: Two Mats Included, Self Healing Surface, Dual Measurements In Inches And Millimeters, 45 And 60 Degree Guides, Stylish Pink Color

openai.title_differentiation: Two Mat Set, 9 By 12 And 12 By 18 Sizes, Dual Inch And Millimeter Grids, 45 And 60 Degree Guides, Self Healing Surface
